cves.description: The installation of Sun Source (sunsrc) tapes allows local users to gain root privileges via setuid root programs (1) makeinstall or (2) winstall.
Buffer overflow in restore program 0.4b17 and earlier in dump package allows local users to execute arbitrary commands via a long tape name.
Unknown vulnerability in the remote tape support (remote.c) in the RMT client for Jorg Schilling sdd 1.28 and 1.31 has unknown impact and attack vectors.
